title: Extract turbo_widgets, turbo_template, and turbo_plx_cli from turbo_packages monorepo
goal: Move three leaf packages out of the turbo_packages monorepo into their own standalone repositories

new_repo_structure.root: Flutter app files (lib/, pubspec.yaml, ios/, android/, web/, etc.) flattened from flutter-app/ to repo root
new_repo_structure.scripts/: Dart CLI scripts for project init and sync (kept at root)
new_repo_structure.Makefile: Firebase deploy, emulators, template sync commands (updated paths)

turbo_widgets: Copy turbo_widgets/ contents to new repo root
Turbo package deps stay as pub.dev ^version constraints
Update example/pubspec.yaml: remove 'resolution: workspace', change turbo_widgets dep to path: ../
Exclude build artifacts (.dart_tool/, build/, coverage/, workspace/) via .gitignore
turbo_plx_cli: Copy turbo_plx_cli/ contents to new repo root
Turbo package deps stay as pub.dev ^version constraints
turbo_template: Copy turbo_template/flutter-app/ contents to new repo root (flatten)
Copy turbo_template/scripts/ to new repo root
Copy turbo_template/Makefile to new repo root (update flutter-app paths)
Recreate firebase symlink at new repo root
Turbo package deps stay as pub.dev ^version constraints
Update scripts that reference flutter-app subdirectory
Update Makefile: remove 'cd flutter-app &&' prefixes from targets like build-assets, fix, dart-fix
Update scripts/lib/config_reader.dart: default templatePath from 'flutter-app' to '.'
Update ARCHITECTURE.md: remove flutter-app/ path prefixes from directory references
Copy turbo_template/.gitignore to new repo root
monorepo_cleanup: Remove turbo_plx_cli, turbo_template/flutter-app, turbo_widgets, turbo_widgets/example from root pubspec.yaml workspace list
Remove turbo_flutter_template from melos pub-check/pub-publish/pub-publish-dry-run ignore filters
Remove root dependencies: cached_network_image, flutter_hooks, soft_edge_blur
Keep json_annotation dependency_override (still needed by turbo_promptable and turbo_serializable)
Keep package directories in place (user will delete manually after verifying new repos)
Update CLAUDE.md dependency hierarchy and project overview
Run make analyze to verify monorepo integrity

decisions.question: How should the three packages be distributed across repos?
decisions.answer: Three separate repos — each package gets its own independent repository with its own versioning, CI, and release cycle.

decisions.question: Should the new repos preserve git history from the monorepo?
decisions.answer: Clean start — each new repo gets a single initial commit with the current package state. The monorepo retains full history as reference.

decisions.question: How should the Firebase configuration be handled in the new turbo_template repo?
decisions.answer: Keep as symlink — the new repo maintains a symlink to pew-pew-platform/firebase. Both repos must be checked out locally.

decisions.question: Should uncommitted work-in-progress files in turbo_widgets be included?
decisions.answer: Assume all work is committed before migration starts. Take the full committed state of each package.

decisions.question: What should the implementing agent actually execute?
decisions.answer: Full execution — create GitHub repos, push code, update the monorepo, commit everything.

decisions.question: Should all three new repos be public?
decisions.answer: turbo_widgets and turbo_plx_cli are public. turbo_template is private (production app with Firebase project IDs).

decisions.question: Should the Flutter app stay nested inside flutter-app/ or flatten to repo root?
decisions.answer: Flatten to root — Flutter app files (lib/, pubspec.yaml, etc.) live at repo root alongside scripts/, firebase/ symlink, Makefile, and config.

decisions.question: Should monorepo package directories be deleted immediately after extraction?
decisions.answer: Keep temporarily — directories stay in the monorepo. User will delete manually after verifying the new repos work.
